title: Open Android Auto Audit Trail
description: Schema for .audit.yaml sidecar files that record verification evidence for proto definitions.

proto.description: Relative path to the .proto file from the repo root. Must be under the oaa/ directory.

message.description: Primary message name defined in this proto file.

confidence.description: Current overall confidence tier for this message.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when this audit file was last modified.

evidence.description: Ordered list of evidence entries supporting this claim. Empty for Unverified tier.

fields.description: Per-field overrides when a specific field's confidence differs from the message level.

platinum_scope.description: Phase 9+ — REQUIRED when confidence=platinum. Values: single_oem (v1.5 default, one OEM capture), multi_oem (v2+ reserved for multi-OEM corroboration).

oem_match_pending_gold.description: Phase 9+ — Phase 10 worklist flag. True if a Silver/Bronze proto was matched in an OEM capture but lacks deep-trace Gold prerequisites. Cannot be promoted to Platinum until Gold is earned.

wire_msg_id.description: Legacy field carried by pre-Phase-9 Gold sidecars — wire-level msg_type identifier (hex string or int). Phase 9 whitelists for backward compatibility.

direction.description: Legacy field carried by pre-Phase-9 Gold sidecars — directional binding (e.g. HU->Phone, Phone->HU, bidir).

channel.description: Legacy field carried by pre-Phase-9 Gold sidecars — channel binding description.

handler.description: Legacy field carried by pre-Phase-9 Gold sidecars — handler class reference (e.g. ied.java m20258P).

class_mapping.description: Legacy field carried by pre-Phase-9 Gold sidecars — obfuscated class mapping per APK version.

retracted.description: Legacy field carried by some retracted sidecars — redundant with confidence: retracted. Phase 9 whitelists for backward compatibility.

retraction.description: Legacy field carried by some retracted sidecars — structured retraction record (date, reason, evidence, corrections).

retraction_reason.description: Legacy field carried by some retracted sidecars — free-form retraction explanation.

replaced_by.description: Legacy field carried by some retracted sidecars — path to the replacement proto definition.

previous_evidence.description: Legacy field carried by some retracted sidecars — historical evidence list preserved for audit trail.

confidence_tier.description: Confidence tier: unverified (no evidence), bronze (single source), silver (2+ distinct types), gold (deep-trace APK + cross-version), platinum (Gold prerequisites + OEM wire capture), retracted (non-ordinal — previously promoted, then invalidated).

type.description: Evidence type — determines which methodology was used to gather this evidence. apk_deep_trace and deep_trace are legacy Gold-tier evidence types retained for backward compatibility; platinum_evidence is the Phase 9+ OEM wire-capture evidence type.

method.description: Sub-method tag (free-form). Describes the specific analysis technique used. See 03-verification-procedures.md for suggested values.

source.description: Human-readable source reference. Include enough detail to locate the raw material.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the evidence was gathered.

description.description: What was found and how. Should be self-contained.

status.description: Phase 8+ — status for cross-version evidence entries. Optional; omitted for pre-Phase-8 entries.

drift_issues.description: Phase 8+ — list of specific drift issues for drift_detected entries. Optional.

kind.description: Drift issue kind matching IssueKind enum value.

field.description: Field number (int) or field name (string) affected.

capture_path.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — relative path to the OEM capture directory or messages.jsonl file.

vehicle_metadata.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — vehicle + AA version provenance.

msg_seq.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — list of message indices (into messages.jsonl) where this proto was observed.

ts_ms.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — observation timestamps in ms relative to capture start.

message_completeness.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — wire-level payload completeness classification (OEM-01 taxonomy).

attribution_method.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — how the observation was attributed to this proto.

oem_scope.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — OEM scope of this evidence entry (single = one OEM capture, multi = corroborated across multiple OEMs).

applicability.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — message-level confirmation (whole shape) vs field-level confirmation (specific fields).

fields.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — list of confirmed field numbers or names. REQUIRED when applicability=fields; OMITTED when applicability=message.

match_rules.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — closed enum of MATCH-* rule IDs this evidence satisfies. See docs/verification/05-oem-match-policy.md for rule definitions. Empty list, duplicates, and unknown rule IDs are all rejected.

nomatch_rules.description: Phase 9+ platinum_evidence — closed enum of NOMATCH-* rule IDs this evidence cites (e.g., explicitly not-observed fields, ambiguous attribution). Optional.

confidence.description: Confidence tier for this specific field.

evidence.description: Evidence entries specific to this field.

notes.description: Free-form notes about this field's verification status.
